'''Manion Basca''' was the [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] owner of the [[Jax Warehouse]]. He employed political activist [[Gerta Haman]] as his inventory supervisor, never thinking about her political positions.

In [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]], when various people were disappearing themselves from [[Gadrin]] and [[Hedrett]] to join the [[Cularin resistance]], Basca lost both his night shift and his day shift, including Haman. The logo of the resistance was painted in the front of the warehouse. Basca reported to the [[Office of Peace and Security]] but, as nothing had been stolen, the agents were not in a hurry to go.
